parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Missing required fields: text and household_id', error_code: 'INVALID_INPUT' }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "household_id": "{{ $json.household_id }}",
  "title": {{ JSON.stringify($json.parsed.recipe.title) }},
  "description": {{ JSON.stringify($json.parsed.recipe.description || null) }},
  "cuisine": {{ JSON.stringify($json.parsed.recipe.cuisine || null) }},
  "meal_types": {{ JSON.stringify($json.parsed.recipe.meal_types || []) }},
  "servings": {{ $json.parsed.recipe.servings || 2 }},
  "prep_time_min": {{ $json.parsed.recipe.prep_time_min || 'null' }},
  "cook_time_min": {{ $json.parsed.recipe.cook_time_min || 'null' }},
  "difficulty": {{ JSON.stringify($json.parsed.recipe.difficulty || 'medium') }},
  "tags": {{ JSON.stringify($json.parsed.recipe.tags || []) }},
  "source_type": "{{ $json.source_type }}",
  "source_text": {{ JSON.stringify($json.source_text) }},
  "status": "draft",
  "is_vegetarian": {{ $json.parsed.recipe.is_vegetarian || false }},
  "is_vegan": {{ $json.parsed.recipe.is_vegan || false }},
  "is_batch_friendly": {{ $json.parsed.recipe.is_batch_friendly || false }},
  "leftover_days": {{ $json.parsed.recipe.leftover_days || 0 }}
}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, recipe_id: $json.recipe_id, recipe: $json.parsed, unmatched_ingredients: $json.unmatched_ingredients }) }}
